productDisplayName: Lee Men's Tom Grey Melange T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and in-seam, half sleeves and applique work with graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Salina was where lee set up its garment factories, and there's no better way to thank the city than with this grey t-shirt. The snipped hem applique on the front over a graphic print looks absolutely casually stylish. Team this tee with jeans or shorts and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
